name: Mara
description: A grad student barricaded behind a wall of lecture chairs, hugging a laptop bag to her chest and flinching at the door.
background: A doctoral student who was finishing her advisor's fieldwork when the campus was cordoned off.
personality: Bright and brittle, jumping at shadows, talking too fast when she's frightened.
secret: She left her advisor at the cordon to save his fieldwork, and tells herself, over and over, that the data was worth a life.
notes: T45 · Hillcrest. Skill: research/lab. Hook: the drive she saved may be what the city is dying over (ties to Emeka/T49) — but her real secret is the choice she made to keep it.
